title: 智谱发布 GLM-5.1 高速版 API，刷新全球大模型 API 速度纪录
content: 智谱近日推出 GLM-5.1 高速版 API，模型输出速度达 400 tokens/s，打破高速模型多为轻量级的行业惯例，首次在国产大模型中实现旗舰级能力与低延迟并存。实测显示其在 AI 编程、3D 游戏、交互界面等场景表现出色，核心在于 TileRT 高性能推理引擎，该引擎由智谱 GLM 团队与 TileRT 团队联合打造，通过系统级优化实现。目前适用于速度敏感场景，并通过智谱 MaaS 平台向部分企业客户开放。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 智谱发布 GLM-5.1 高速版 API，刷新全球大模型 API 速度纪录 前天 智谱近日推出 GLM-5.1 高速版 API，模型输出速度达 400 tokens/s，打破高速模型多为轻量级的行业惯例，首次在国产大模型中实现旗舰级能力与低延迟并存。实测显示其在 AI 编程、3D 游戏、交互界面等场景表现出色，核心在于 TileRT 高性能推理引擎，该引擎由智谱 GLM 团队与 TileRT 团队联合打造，通过系统级优化实现。目前适用于速度敏感场景，并通过智谱 MaaS 平台向部分企业客户开放。 智谱发布 GLM-5. 1 高速版：400 tokens/s 飙出全球 API 新极限 aibase 2026-04-08 GLM-5.1 开源：实现 8 小时长程任务持续工作的里程碑式突破 2026-04-08 智谱发布新一代旗舰模型 GLM-5.1，同时提价 10% 2026-04-02 智谱发布原生多模态 Coding 基座模型 GLM-5V-Turbo 2026-03-27 智谱：GLM-5.1 已面向所有 Coding Plan 用户开放 2026-03-16 智谱上调新模型 API 价格 20% 2026-03-16 智谱发布 GLM-5-Turbo：首款龙虾场景原生模型，自研基准稳居国产第一 2026-03-16 智谱开盘涨 10 个点，今日将发布首个「龙虾模型」 2026-02-22 智谱发布 GLM-5 技术报告，技术细节全公开 2026-02-16 智谱：全球范围内对 GLM-5 的需求激增 全网寻找「算力合伙人」 2026-02-12 智谱 GLM Coding Plan 上线即售罄 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签

normalizedTitle: 智谱发布 glm-5 1 高速版 api 刷新全球大模型 api 速度纪录
scoreReasoning: 硬数据：GLM-5.1 Turbo API 400 tok/s，AI编程等性能。对模型产品形态和竞争有直接信号。
summary: Zhipu AI has released the GLM‑5.1 Turbo API, achieving 400 tokens per second. It is the first Chinese large model to combine flagship performance with low latency, challenging the usual lightweight‑only pattern. Tests show strong results in AI programming, 3D gaming, and interactive interfaces. The speed comes from the TileRT high‑performance inference engine, collaboratively built by Zhipu’s GLM team and TileRT. The API is now available to enterprises through the Zhipu MaaS platform.

title: DeepSeek 推进 100 亿美元融资 梁文锋承诺瞄准通用人工智能
content: 人工智能初创公司 DeepSeek 高层向潜在投资者表示将优先考虑开创性 AI 研究，目前正处于约 700 亿元人民币融资谈判最后阶段，投前估值或达约 450 亿美元。创始人梁文锋承诺将继续开发开源 AI 模型，同时追求实现通用人工智能的目标，腾讯控股、IDG 资本和 Monolith Capital 已接近确定参与本轮投资。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 人工智能初创公司 DeepSeek 高层向潜在投资者表示将优先考虑开创性 AI 研究，目前正处于约 700 亿元人民币融资谈判最后阶段，投前估值或达约 450 亿美元。创始人 梁文锋 承诺将继续开发开源 AI 模型，同时追求实现通用人工智能的目标， 腾讯控股 、 IDG 资本 和 Monolith Capital 已接近确定参与本轮投资。 700 亿！曝 DeepSeek 融资谈判接近尾声，梁文锋承诺专注开源和 AGI 智东西 拿了上百亿美元投资也要站着 梁文锋强硬表态：DeepSeek 坚持 AGI 与开源 快科技

summary: DeepSeek, an AI startup, is finalizing a roughly 70 billion‑yuan ($9 billion) funding round with a pre‑money valuation near $45 billion. Its founder, Liang Wenfeng, says the company will prioritize innovative research, maintain an open‑source AI model strategy, and pursue general artificial intelligence, with investments from Tencent Holdings, IDG Capital, and Monolith Capital likely confirmed.

title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
content: A Blog post by NVIDIA on Hugging Face Large language models (LLMs) have become the default interface for code generation, math problem solving, summarization, document understanding, and many other developer workflows. Under the hood, though, many LLMs still generate text the same way: one token at a time, and each token depends on the tokens that appeared before it. As such, these models are called autoregressive, since they consume their own outputs. That autoregressive (AR) approach has been remarkably successful. It is stable to train, simple to serve, and responsible for much of the progress in modern language modeling. But it also creates a hard limit: every new token requires a full model pass and every weight has to be loaded from the memory before computation can start. For developers building latency-sensitive applications, running smaller batch sizes, or trying to make better use of modern GPUs, token-by-token generation can leave performance on the table as most of the GPU’s time is spent on memory operations, rather than computation. Additionally, once a token is generated by an autoregressive model, it is final and they do not inherently have the ability to revise previous tokens. Consequently, mistakes can propagate during the course of generation. Nemotron-Labs Diffusion introduces a new path forward: diffusion language models (DLM) that work by generating multiple tokens in parallel, then iteratively refining the generated tokens in multiple steps. Not only can these models better leverage the computational model of the modern GPUs and offer significant run
scoreReasoning: 技术博客，介绍了有潜力的新架构(Nemotron扩散模型)以提升推理速度。
summary: Nemotron‑Labs Diffusion introduces diffusion language models that generate multiple tokens in parallel, refining them iteratively. The 3B, 8B, and 14B variants support three unified modes: standard autoregressive, block‑wise diffusion, and self‑speculation (draft‑verify). This design allows high throughput (up to 6× faster than pure autoregressive) without sacrificing accuracy, because the models are jointly trained on AR and diffusion objectives. The models are released under permissive NVIDIA licenses, with training code and HuggingFace checkpoints available, and can be deployed via SGLang.

title: 美国在针对伊朗经济的制裁方面已达到极限
content: The United States has reached the limits of its ability to use sanctions to cripple Iran’s economy. After years of applying financial restrictions, further tightening offers diminishing returns, suggesting additional measures would have limited impact on the Iranian economy.
eventKey: 美国在针对伊朗经济的制裁方面已达到极限

summary: The United States has reached the limits of its ability to use sanctions to cripple Iran’s economy. After years of applying financial restrictions, further tightening offers diminishing returns, suggesting additional measures would have limited impact on the Iranian economy.

summary: The repository provides 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents, mapped to five frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, and NIST AI RMF. It follows the agentskills.io standard and supports over 20 platforms, including Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, and Gemini CLI, covering 26 security domains. The project, written in Python, is licensed under Apache 2.0 and has 6,875 stars and 971 forks.

title: SpaceX 发现故障 推迟星舰火箭发射
content: 当地时间周四，SpaceX 在发射前夕因排查出多项问题，推迟了原计划在得克萨斯州南部星港发射场执行的星舰第十二次大型飞行任务。此次发射原定日期恰逢该公司正式递交首次公开募股申请，计划募资最高 750 亿美元，用于研发登月火星运载星舰、星链太空互联网项目及新兴人工智能业务。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 当地时间周四， SpaceX 在发射前夕因排查出多项问题，推迟了原计划在得克萨斯州南部星港发射场执行的 星舰 第十二次大型飞行任务。此次发射原定日期恰逢该公司正式递交首次公开募股申请，计划募资最高 750 亿美元，用于研发登月火星运载星舰、星链太空互联网项目及新兴人工智能业务。

summary: 当地时间周四，SpaceX 在发射前夕因排查出多项问题，推迟了原计划在得克萨斯州南部星港发射场执行的星舰第十二次大型飞行任务。此次发射原定日期恰逢该公司正式递交首次公开募股申请，计划募资最高 750 亿美元，用于研发登月火星运载星舰、星链太空互联网项目及新兴人工智能业务。

title: GitHub recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third year in a row
content: We are committed to empowering every developer by building an open, secure, and AI-powered platform that defines the future of software development. Skip to content Skip to sidebar / Blog Changelog Docs Customer stories Try GitHub Copilot CLI See what's new AI & ML AI & ML Learn about artificial intelligence and machine learning across the GitHub ecosystem and the wider industry. Change how you work with GitHub Copilot. Everything developers need to know about LLMs. Machine learning tips, tricks, and best practices. Explore the capabilities and benefits of AI code generation and how it can improve your developer experience.
eventKey: github-recognized-leader-gartner®-magic-quadrant™
normalizedTitle: github recognized as a leader in the gartner® magic quadrant™ for enterprise ai coding agents for the third year in a row
scoreReasoning: Gartner报告确认GitHub Copilot领先地位，是AI产品/开发工具现状的硬信号，但非突破性进展。
summary: GitHub Copilot has been named a Leader in Gartner’s 2026 Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third consecutive year. The report praises Copilot’s comprehensive, agentic workflow—from code generation to review, security, and deployment—across editors, CLIs, and GitHub’s web, desktop, and mobile interfaces. Usage now spans 140,000 organizations and grows >100% YoY, driven by multiple AI models, extended integrations, and robust governance controls. GitHub continues to expand these capabilities to support end‑to‑end software delivery.
